The **PE postcode area**, also known as the **[Peterborough](/wiki/Peterborough "Peterborough") postcode area**,[[2]](#cite_note-2) is a group of thirty-six postcode districts in eastern England, within 18 [post towns](/wiki/Post_town "Post town"). These cover north and west [Cambridgeshire](/wiki/Cambridgeshire "Cambridgeshire") (including [Peterborough](/wiki/Peterborough "Peterborough"), [Huntingdon](/wiki/Huntingdon "Huntingdon"), [Chatteris](/wiki/Chatteris "Chatteris"), [St. Neots](/wiki/St._Neots "St. Neots"), [St. Ives](/wiki/St._Ives,_Cambridgeshire "St. Ives, Cambridgeshire"), [March](/wiki/March,_Cambridgeshire "March, Cambridgeshire") and [Wisbech](/wiki/Wisbech "Wisbech")), much of south and east [Lincolnshire](/wiki/Lincolnshire "Lincolnshire") (including [Bourne](/wiki/Bourne,_Lincolnshire "Bourne, Lincolnshire"), [Stamford](/wiki/Stamford,_Lincolnshire "Stamford, Lincolnshire"), [Spalding](/wiki/Spalding,_Lincolnshire "Spalding, Lincolnshire"), [Boston](/wiki/Boston,_Lincolnshire "Boston, Lincolnshire"), [Skegness](/wiki/Skegness "Skegness") and [Spilsby](/wiki/Spilsby "Spilsby")), and west [Norfolk](/wiki/Norfolk "Norfolk") (including [King's Lynn](/wiki/King%27s_Lynn "King's Lynn"), [Hunstanton](/wiki/Hunstanton "Hunstanton"), [Sandringham](/wiki/Sandringham,_Norfolk "Sandringham, Norfolk"), [Swaffham](/wiki/Swaffham "Swaffham") and [Downham Market](/wiki/Downham_Market "Downham Market")), plus the north-easternmost part of [Northamptonshire](/wiki/Northamptonshire "Northamptonshire"), the easternmost part of [Rutland](/wiki/Rutland "Rutland") and very small parts of [Bedfordshire](/wiki/Bedfordshire "Bedfordshire").
